Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim and Capt Chris Adams, sight fish for Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon on the east coast of Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace spend the day on Lake Vermilion catching smallmouth bass in the shallows on classic tubes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Shallow Water Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this exciting episode of FishON!, we hit the legendary Bay of Quinte with none other than Dicki (Richard Sommerville), the ice fishing legend himself. With years of experience and a knack for finding trophy walleye, Dicki helps us navigate the ever-changing ice conditions and put our gear to the test. From early morning setups to heart-pounding battles with giant Quinte gold, this episode is packed with action, expert tips, and stunning winter scenery. Don't miss the ultimate ice fishing adventure!
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte

Image.alt: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte

Video.summary: This week we find everyones favorite fish...sheephead. but were going out in search of Giants!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Up the Creek
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Up the Creek
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we head to Frederick House Lake in Connaught, Ontario, just east of Timmins. With a narrow window of opportunity before the weather closes in, we reel in some fantastic walleye, sauger, and other exciting species. It's all about adapting to the elements and making the most of the moment!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Storm’s Edge Success: Fishing Frederick House Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fly in with us to Blackbirch Lake with Gray Wood Outfitter for some non stop action
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe Father Son Challenge Part 1
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Father Son Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Friend and fellow Michigander, Brian McCarter turns Kim on to a productive pattern for autumn largemouths. Suspended schools of bluegills set the stage for this informative episode. The Strike King Sexy Spoon is the featured lure.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this exciting episode, we venture out onto Porcupine Lake for some beautiful walleye action with Craig Salmonson from Timmins Angling Adventures. Patience was key as we waited for a break in challenging weather conditions—but it all paid off with an unforgettable day on the water. Tune in for expert tips, stunning scenery, and the thrill of fishing in Northern Ontario!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Weathering the Storm: Walleye on Porcupine Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Aligator Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Ty Sjodin have so much fun in North Dakota where the feedbag is on.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Fantastic Fishing In North Dakota
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fly in with us to Blackbirch Lake with Gray Wood Outfitter for some non stop action
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Through her 36 years in the Army as a nurse and medic, Laura Ludwig faced many challenges. None more difficult than taking care of the young men and women who served in Iraq and Afghanistan. Since coming home Laura has not stopped serving.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Army Nurse Laura Ludwig
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On this Stoked On Fishing adventure, we take some first-time anglers offshore to Santa Catalina Island and teach them how to fish for Yellowtail and Calico Bass. We also get a chance to check out some of the cool features of Simrad electronics has to offer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Santa Catalina Island Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Pitching and flipping are effective methods to catch Bass in shallow waters, undercover trees, and grass. Shea heads out solo skiff fishing for Bass in Lake Perris. He explains his techniques and tests out a topwater frog lure at dusk.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Flipping and Pitching Lake Perris, CA, Part One
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Florida's weedy Lake Okeechobee boasts topwater buzzbait bassin' at its best.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Larry fishes with some military vets for a walleye grand slam.
Video.title: Warrior Walleye Shootout

Video.summary: This is our six-year fishing with acute angling aboard the Blackwater Explorer fishing the Rio Negro in the Amazon River of Brazil. Shea McIntee and the crew fish for Peacock Bass and hope to get lucky and catch a monster.
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — Home of the Largest Peacock Bass, Pt. 3

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — Home of the Largest Peacock Bass, Pt. 3
Stoked on Fishing — Home of the Largest Peacock Bass, Pt. 3
Stoked on Fishing — Home of the Largest Peacock Bass, Pt. 3

Video.summary: Jim visits Cast Industries to see how lure molds are made. Then he visits Lure Parts Online to show you how to pour your own soft plastic baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Making Lure Molds & Pouring soft plastics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin is off to Central Florida to fish with veteran angler Bernie Schultz.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Welcome to La Paz, the captivating capital of Baja California Sur, situated approximately 3/4 of the way down the breathtaking Baja Peninsula. La Paz is renowned for its stunning seafront beaches, lush parks, vibrant art scene, and waterfront dining that will leave you mesmerized. Join us as we embark on a thrilling adventure diving into this coastal paradise for the very first time.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | The Ultimate Baja Mexico Fishing Trip: Stoked on La Paz – Part Three
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin gambles with a long run in search of big pre-spawn bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Today on Stoked On Fishing, we head offshore on the Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot Everglades with an All-Star crew searching for bluefin tuna. We take out Okuma Fishing Tackles President Doug and John, head of product development. We also have on board Colin and his wife, Amanda from Grundens, and our friend Toby from Mag Bay Lures and Mag Bay Resort down in Baja, Mexico. This trip was absolutely nuts, with the best Blue Fin Tuna fishing we have seen in Sothern California all year.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Southern California Bluefin Tuna Fishing at Its Finest
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with the most celebrated mind in Bass Fishing, Drew Gill. In depth conversation about his forward-facing sonar set up and strategy.
Video.title: Episode 1
